theme_and_archetype.archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for premium local service
theme_and_archetype.rationale: Conveys premium quality, authority, trust, and immaculate cleanliness for a doorstep car wash service in Surat.

spacing_and_layout.general: Use generous spacing (p-12, p-24, py-32). Mobile-first responsive design.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Use 'Bento' Mode A (Tetris Grid) for 'Why Choose Us'. Use CSS Grid with generous gaps (gap-8, gap-12) for Pricing and Process sections.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Max-width container (max-w-7xl) centered. Internal padding for bordered containers (p-6 to p-8).
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense text and form inputs. Optical alignment for buttons with icons.

surfaces_and_components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/5). Sticky top with z-50. Navigation links and Book Now CTA must be visible on desktop.
surfaces_and_components.cards: Neumorphic/Tactile variant. Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), no default shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Primary CTA uses Brand Primary (#0066FF) with white text. Explicit hover states (bg-[#0052CC]). Must include data-testid.
surfaces_and_components.forms: Use Shadcn customized form components (Input, Select, Textarea). Slightly rounded edges (rounded-md). High contrast focus states.
surfaces_and_components.footer: Contrast shift: Dark footer (bg-[#0A2540] text-white). Massive 'CLEANDRIVE' text (text-[10vw] or text-6xl for scale) and copyright.

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Asymmetrical split. Heavy typography for H1 'Premium Doorstep Car Wash in Surat'. Prominent 'Book Now' CTA. Hero image overlay max bg-black/30 or bg-white/20 depending on placement.
sections.content: Company name: CleanDrive. Emphasize trust and convenience.

sections.name: About / Why Choose Us
sections.layout: Bento Grid (md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12). Highlight USPs: Trained staff, premium cleaning liquid, nano polish cloth (scratch protection), daily morning service, eco-friendly.
sections.visuals: Use subtle icons (lucide-react) and large accent numbers.

sections.name: How We Clean (3-Step)
sections.steps: Step 1: Remove Dust & Loose Dirt. Step 2: Spray & Clean. Step 3: Wipe with Microfibre Cloth.

sections.name: Pricing Plans
sections.layout: Tabs component to toggle between '5 Seater' and '7 Seater'. 4 pricing cards per tab: Monthly Daily, 90 Days, Alternate Days, 4-Time Cleaning. Include 'Choose Plan' CTA per card.

sections.name: Enquiry Form
sections.layout: Structured grid for form fields. Fields: Full Name, Phone, Email (optional), Address/Area, Car Type, Preferred Plan, Preferred Time Slot, Message. Solid Submit Button.
sections.technical: Use Shadcn Select for dropdowns (Car Type, Plan, Time Slot).

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scroll enabled. Framer motion for staggered entrance animations (fade-in and slight slide-up).
motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit hover states on interactive elements. Pricing cards lift on hover.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. White text on Primary Blue passes AA.
accessibility.testing: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-book-now-button', data-testid='pricing-monthly-plan-button', data-testid='enquiry-submit').

hero.description: Sleek black luxury car inside car wash, premium feel.

process_1.description: Black luxury car with soapy foam (Remove Dust & Wash).

process_2.description: Vehicle being washed with water and soap.

process_3.description: Person cleaning a car with a yellow microfiber cloth.
